Off Calendar Nov-01-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Claudia Garcia, Esq. 415-591-7649 of Drinker Biddle & Reath for Defendant.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BAYER HEALTHCARE PHARMACEUTICALS INC., BAYER HEALTHCARE LLC'S VERIFIED APPLICATION FOR ADMISSION OF JENNIFER L. GREENBLATT TO THE BAR OF THIS COURT PRO HAC VICE.

Defendants' application for the pro hac vice admission of Jennifer Greenblatt is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown.

Order signed in Open Court. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302)
